title: The Disc Adder!
description:
A Mod That Adds My Favorite Music! You Can Also Request Musics To be Added!
PLEASE NOTE! THE MOD STILL DOESE'NT WORK IN SURVIVAL! CREATIVE USE ONLY!
body:
This Mod Is Amazing For 3 Reasons!

1. You Can Participate!
2. I Will Add New Music Every So Often!
3. I Will Look At Your Music Requests!

The Official Disc Adder Has Now Been Published On Modrinth! We Recomend Using Creative To Play This Mod!

Find Our Blog At:[https://www.planetminecraft.com/blog/the-disc-mod-blog/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/blog/the-disc-mod-blog/)
